name: vibebus
description: Project-scoped coordination for independent Codex tasks.

interface.longDescription: Use a local SQLite fact bus for recoverable agents, directed messages, acknowledgements, atomically claimed tasks, renewable file reservations, event subscriptions, and structured handoffs across independent Codex tasks.
defaultPrompt: Register this task with VibeBus and check its inbox.
Use VibeBus to coordinate this work with the other project tasks.
